<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below.
Delete any sections that don't apply to your PR.
-->

## What
<!-- A short, clear summary of what this PR does. One or two sentences. -->


## Why
<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve or what does it improve?
     If this was suggested in the Reddit thread, link or quote the suggestion. -->


## Description
<!-- A more detailed explanation of the changes. What did you add, remove, or modify?
     Mention any important implementation details or design decisions. -->


## Issue
<!-- Link any related issue(s). Use "Closes #123" to auto-close on merge, or "Refs #123" if related. -->


## Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply with an [x] -->
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Gameplay tweak / balancing
- [ ] Art / audio / asset change
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## How to Test
<!-- Step-by-step instructions so the maintainer can verify your change.
     Example:
     1. Launch the game
     2. Go to level 2
     3. Try to jump on the new platform — confirm it doesn't break collision -->


## Screenshots / Video
<!-- If your change affects visuals or gameplay, drop a screenshot or short clip here. -->


## Checklist
- [ ] I tested this change locally and it works as expected
- [ ] I did not break any existing functionality (to the best of my knowledge)
- [ ] My code follows the project's style / conventions
- [ ] I agree to the contribution terms in the LICENSE file

## Additional Notes
<!-- Anything else the maintainer should know? Open questions, known issues, follow-up work, etc. -->
